rulings.Case Title: DANIEL BOREEN VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Orders And Judgment; Apply For New Trial
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 11, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF DANIEL BOREEN'S Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Orders And Judgment; Apply For New Trial DENIED. Failed to show excusable neglect, et al. per CCP 473B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLE WOOLDRIDGE VS. ARTHUR STEVEN BROWN, ALSO KNOWN AS STEVE BROWN et al
